dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The governance-context-builder step executed successfully and passed schema validation. The agent correctly ingested a large prompt context (22,776 tokens) to establish the governance framework.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: While the architecture-work-assessment step completed successfully, the completion token count (5,580) is significantly lower than the baseline (13,772). This suggests a reduction in the depth and granularity of the causal analysis compared to the previous high-performing run.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The agent successfully integrated the governance context into the assessment, but the lower total token volume for the assessment step (28,662 vs 36,854 in baseline) indicates a less exhaustive exploration of architectural trade-offs and tensions.
